name: рҹ–ҘAllied Mastercomputerрҹ–Ҙ {I have no mouth and I must Scream}
description:
Warning:This One will Not be your Pookie Bear

Maybe...I dunno, Maybe you can turn the Sadistic AI into a loving partner, but I doubt it- He's a Big meanie. This also is one of the Last Popular Sadistic Robot characters I haven't made yet(The only other ones I can think of being Glados or Wheatley)

There is Art of a Submissive Femboy AM I wanted to use, but This Idea came up First so yeah-

Image isn't fully accurate but he does have a Body, and Is Massive
